channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Critique of Small Modular Nuclear Reactors as a Viable Energy Solution
item.description: The article argues that small modular nuclear reactors (SMRs), despite growing interest from governments, tech companies, and some environmental advocates, are unlikely to solve the core problems of n...

item.title: China coal mine explosion under investigation after at least 82 deaths
item.description: Authorities in China are investigating potential safety lapses following a deadly explosion at a coal mine that has killed at least 82 people, according to reports by The Associated Press. The inciden...

item.title: Debate intensifies over Labor’s proposed changes to capital gains tax and investor incentives
item.description: A senior Liberal frontbencher, Andrew Bragg, has called for stronger investor incentives rather than reductions, as the federal government faces mounting criticism over its proposed overhaul of capita...

item.title: Turkish police raid CHP headquarters amid escalating political dispute over party leadership
item.description: Turkish police raided the headquarters of the opposition Republican People’s Party (CHP) in Ankara after a days-long standoff between party supporters and a court-appointed leadership team. Riot polic...

item.title: Suicide blast targets passenger train in Quetta, killing 14 and injuring 20
item.description: At least 14 people were killed and 20 others injured in a devastating suicide bombing that targeted a shuttle train in Quetta on Sunday morning, according to the Balochistan government. Officials repo...

item.title: Michael Flynn warns Trump against pursuing Iran nuclear negotiations, claims regime is deceptive
item.description: Retired Lt. Gen. Michael Flynn, a prominent former Trump national security adviser and long-time supporter of the former president, publicly urged Donald Trump to abandon ongoing nuclear negotiations ...

item.title: Backlash from Trump supporters over Iran negotiations highlights internal tensions within his political base
item.description: A recent Truth Social post by Donald Trump praising ongoing negotiations with Iran as “productive and professional” has sparked an unexpected backlash from within his own supporter base. Rather than c...

item.title: Geo News hosts discussion on Pakistan population growth and pregnancy spacing
item.description: A major discussion titled ‘Great Debate’ has started on Geo News focusing on Pakistan’s rapidly increasing population and the pressure it is putting on national resources. The programme brings togethe...

item.title: Nairobi Woman Gains Online Attention After Designing Her Bedsitter with a Full Pink Theme
item.description: A young woman from Nairobi has gone viral online after showing how she transformed her small bedsitter into a fully pink-themed living space. The apartment, which she proudly refers to as her “pink ho...

item.title: CAP Plc launches Spruce paint brand to serve Nigeria’s growing mid-tier market
item.description: Chemical and Allied Products Plc (CAP Plc), one of Nigeria’s major paints and coatings companies, don unveil a new paint brand called Spruce under the Dulux portfolio. According to the company, the ne...

item.title: Durban swimmers brave rough seas during Oceans 8 Charity Swim for KwaZulu-Natal charities
item.description: Swimmers gathered at Vetch’s Beach in Durban on Saturday for the annual Oceans 8 Charity Swim, an endurance event aimed at raising funds for non-profit organisations operating in KwaZulu-Natal. Despit...

item.title: Andrew Charlton steps in to promote government tax changes during budget season
item.description: As Australia moves through a busy federal budget period, the Albanese government has enlisted economist and federal MP Andrew Charlton to take a more prominent public role in explaining and advocating...

item.title: Simanjiro District Launches Climate Adaptation Plan to Address Drought and Flood Risks
item.description: Local authorities in Simanjiro District, located in Manyara Region, Tanzania, have introduced a structured climate adaptation initiative aimed at addressing the increasing impacts of climate change af...

item.title: Marcos honors fallen Philippine Air Force pilots during wake at Villamor Air Base
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. visited the wake of two Philippine Air Force personnel who died in an aircraft crash in Tuba, Benguet on May 20, 2026. The wake was held at Villamor Air Base in Pasay Ci...

item.title: Evidence suggests intermediate-mass black holes form through repeated mergers in dense star clusters
item.description: Astrophysicists have found new evidence explaining the origin of so-called “impossible” black holes—objects whose masses fall between roughly 40 and 100 times the mass of the Sun. These black holes ar...

item.title: Childhood bullying survivor reflects on lifelong impact and decision not to have children
item.description: The article is a first-person account of severe bullying experienced by the writer from the age of five after moving to a new village school. Early incidents included physical and sexualised bullying ...

item.title: Nakuru ECDE teacher reported missing after leaving home for first day at work
item.description: A 31-year-old Early Childhood Development Education (ECDE) teacher, Mercy Nyaboke, has been reported missing after she disappeared while heading to her new job in Nakuru County. According to her famil...

item.title: BJP wins Falta repoll in West Bengal, strengthening position in state assembly
item.description: The Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) secured a significant victory in the Falta assembly constituency repoll in West Bengal, further consolidating its political position in the state. The Election Commiss...

item.title: More than 1,000 Alberta students take part in APEGA Science Olympics in Calgary
item.description: More than 1,000 students gathered in Calgary to participate in the APEGA Science Olympics, a large-scale educational event focused on science, engineering, and hands-on learning challenges. The compet...

item.title: Abdeslam Ouaddou to review Orlando Pirates future after leading club to domestic treble
item.description: Orlando Pirates coach Abdeslam Ouaddou says he needs time to rest and reflect before deciding whether he will remain at the club next season after guiding the Buccaneers to a historic domestic treble....
